Constellation.title: Constellation
Constellation.description: A custom user-defined freckle constellation and reading

id.description: Unique identifier of the constellation document

constellationName.description: User custom name or generated name of the constellation

constellationType.description: Type classification or visual shape representation of the constellation

element.description: Governing elemental power, e.g., Aether, Nebula, Stardust

celestialReading.description: Astro-poetic descriptive reading of the mapped pattern

significanceDetail.description: Calculated details outlining personality, destiny, and cosmic rhythm

starNodes.description: A list of mapped active stars with coordinate details and individual significance

connections.description: Interconnecting vector lines matching starNode ids

starStyle.description: Custom color/element style of the star nodes

userId.description: The unique Firebase Auth User ID of the owner who saved the constellation

date.description: Date of creation or save operation

createdAt.description: The exact creation server timestamp of the record

/constellations/{constellationId}.description: User created custom or generated facial constellations
